g.text: Best for AI pipelines, replay on failure

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Simpler to set up, lower throughput

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Best for simple task queues and routing

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: For AI systems always choose Kafka. Replay on failure is non-negotiable in production ingestion pipelines.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Interview tip: Kafka vs RabbitMQ — Kafka keeps messages after consumption (replay possible),

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: RabbitMQ deletes after consumption. For AI systems Kafka is almost always the right answer.
